This item can be used in tradeskills.

Race: ALL
Chunk of Meat
Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
This is a meal!
WT: 1.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Food
Food Duration:Meal(8)
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 1 sp 4 cp

Sage
73 posts
There is a vendor during the daytime on the second floor of Seafarer's Rest in East Freeport who sells unlimited amounts of Chunk of Meat. Lunce Nasin at -230, -860.

# Jan 08 2002 at 2:16 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361329740
3 posts
This cant be purchaced at vendors, its sctrictly a mob drop.
▲ Page top
RE: Vendors
QuoteReply
# Jan 10 2002 at 10:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245540911
10 posts
This is true of course, unless someone has sold them a few pieces and those pieces were in the view to be available to be sold.

These are a great source of free food, so put them infront of any rations you have so you can eat them first.

You can also use these in your bakeing skill, making meat pie. If someone knows of a vendor that has these in inventory when the servers are reset, email me, I love meat pot pies :)

Thanks,

Edited, Thu Jan 10 10:32:52 2002
▲ Page top
